scripts.start:all: concurrently --names "USER,CHARTER,DIRECT,YACHT,EXP,LOC,COMMS,BOOKING,PAYMENT,GATEWAY" --prefix-colors "blue,green,bgCyan,white,bgBlue,cyan,yellow,red,bgGreen,magenta" "npm run start:user-service" "npm run start:charter-service" "npm run start:direct-charter-service" "npm run start:yacht-service" "npm run start:experience-service" "npm run start:location-service" "npm run start:communication-service" "npm run start:booking-service" "npm run start:payment-service" "npm run start:api-gateway"
scripts.start:all:prod: concurrently --names "USER,CHARTER,BOOKING,PAYMENT,COMMS,LOCATION,GATEWAY" --prefix-colors "blue,green,cyan,yellow,red,white,magenta" "npm run start:user-service" "npm run start:charter-service" "npm run start:booking-service" "npm run start:payment-service" "npm run start:communication-service" "npm run start:location-service" "npm run start:api-gateway"
scripts.build:all: nest build api-gateway && nest build user-service && nest build charter-service && nest build direct-charter-service && nest build yacht-service && nest build experience-service && nest build booking-service && nest build payment-service && nest build communication-service && nest build location-service
